parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Techulus Push destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise push:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a Techulus Push API JSON body and post it to push.techulus.com (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to Techulus Push API (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Techulus destinations, direct

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Techulus Push apikey
